items.title: China should stop hoarding food and fertiliser, says former World Bank chief
items.dek: David Malpass also said that Beijing's claim to be a developing nation is no longer credible.

items.title: US in closely-guarded talks to open new bases in Greenland
items.dek: It is seeking to open three bases in the south of the Arctic territory, according to multiple officials familiar with the talks.
items.body: It is seeking to open three bases in the south of the Arctic territory, according to multiple officials familiar with the talks.
